reviews.review_description:
Crêpe Master is a super fun concept! I always dreamed of hitting people with a pan and a spatula 😍

I feel like I've not achieve my complete transformation into a crêpe goddess, but hope I soon will!

The team behind Crêpe Master seems open to feedbacks so do not hesitate to share your experience!

On my side I had troubles activating my magical girl pose (left hand on waist, right hand up), i'm curious about what's happening. EDIT : I manage to activate it with the help of devs, IT'S AMAZING

Cheerz to the team 🪄

developer_response.body:
Hey Stella!
Thanks a lot for your kind review, it really means a lot to us! 💛

To enter CrepoTrance, raise your right arm up and keep your left arm down alongside your leg (not on the hip) + press both triggers! The tutorial is indeed a bit confusing, sorry about that.

We’ll fix it soon and push a patch! Thanks again for playing and for taking the time to share your feedback 🙏
